summary: Completed testing of redesigned Medical Information section in onboarding profile page. All 28 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified all new medical fields are present, Diabetes Type and Adherence Rate fields are correctly removed from Medical Information section, and Patient Detail page shows Medical Information card when data exists and hides it when no data is filled.
critical_code_review_comments: All new medical fields (main_disease, consulting_doctor_name, clinic_hospital_details, last_doctor_visit_date, regular_lab_details, last_lab_visit_date, mobility_status, other_critical_info) are properly implemented in both backend and frontend
Diabetes Type and Adherence Rate fields are correctly removed from Medical Information section in onboarding page
Auto-detected diseases from medicines are displayed as read-only badges in Medical Information section
Medical Information Summary card on Patient Detail page correctly shows/hides based on whether medical data exists
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Used existing test patient Anita Sharma (ID: 5d16441e-5b76-4dac-a164-8ca85ec5a614) with pre-filled medical data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Medical Information redesign is complete and working. Backend tests cover: GET /api/patients/{id}/onboarding returns all 8 new medical fields, PUT /api/patients/{id}/onboarding accepts and saves all new fields, GET /api/patients/{id} returns medical fields for patient detail page. Frontend tests verified: Onboarding page Medical Information section shows all new fields with correct data-testid attributes, Diabetes Type and Adherence Rate are NOT in Medical Information section, Patient Detail page shows Medical Information Summary card when data exists and hides it when no data is filled, Save functionality persists changes correctly.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/patients/{id}/onboarding: PASS - Returns all 8 new medical fields (main_disease, consulting_doctor_name, clinic_hospital_details, last_doctor_visit_date, regular_lab_details, last_lab_visit_date, mobility_status, other_critical_info)
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/patients/{id}/onboarding: PASS - Accepts and saves all new medical fields individually and in bulk
backend_endpoints.GET /api/patients/{id}: PASS - Returns medical fields for display on patient detail page

frontend_features.Onboarding Medical Information section: PASS - Shows all 8 new fields with correct labels and data-testid attributes
frontend_features.Auto-detected diseases display: PASS - Shows read-only badges for Thyroid, Hypertension, Elderly Care
frontend_features.Diabetes Type field removal: PASS - NOT present in Medical Information section
frontend_features.Adherence Rate field removal: PASS - NOT present in Medical Information section
frontend_features.Patient Detail Medical Info card (with d: PASS - Shows all medical fields when data exists
frontend_features.Patient Detail Medical Info card (no dat: PASS - Card is hidden when no medical data is filled
frontend_features.Save functionality: PASS - Changes persist after save and page reload

mocked_apis_note: enCARE sync endpoints (/api/sync/patient/{id}, /api/sync/medications/{id}, /api/sync/vitals/{id}) are MOCKED as noted in previous iteration
